headline: Eye Pain? Get Evaluated by a Specialist in Chennai
subheadline: Eye pain can stem from minor irritation or more serious underlying conditions. AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari provides prompt, thorough evaluation in KK Nagar.
metaDescription: Experiencing eye pain? See AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari in KK Nagar, Chennai for prompt evaluation. Call or book online.
symptoms: Persistent ache in or around one or both eyes
Pain along with redness or sensitivity to light

processSteps.title: Detailed Examination
processSteps.description: Assessing the eye surface, internal pressure, and overall eye health.

processSteps.title: Identifying the Source
processSteps.description: Determining whether the cause is on the surface, inside the eye, or related to the optic nerve.

processSteps.title: Prompt Treatment
processSteps.description: Addressing the cause directly -- not just masking the discomfort.
